creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_activity.cgi?id=266891>, for example, prefixed: 

    x11-wm/xfce4: …

– assigned to ports-bugs@

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/x11-wm/xfce4/Makefile?id=141c53998346d9e932ecf0ab3290f4f80b2f65a5> shows the maintainer for x11-wm/xfce4 as the Xfce team, xfce@

Please, is this a bug? Or working as expected, where a prefix was missing at the outset?
